label: Weather
description: Defines a weather type: how long it lasts, its eligibility conditions, gameplay multipliers, sky colors, ambient sounds, and the C# worker class that implements its effects.

durationRange.label: Duration range
durationRange.description: Range of ticks this weather lasts when it starts. Drawn uniformly at weather start.

repeatable.label: Repeatable
repeatable.description: If false, this weather can only occur once per game.

isBad.label: Is bad
isBad.description: If true, this weather is considered bad and may affect colonist mood and storyteller behavior.

canOccurAsRandomForcedEvent.label: Can occur as random forced event
canOccurAsRandomForcedEvent.description: If true, the storyteller may force this weather as a random event outside normal biome commonality.

favorability.label: Favorability
favorability.description: How favorable this weather is considered. Affects colonist thoughts and biome scoring.

temperatureRange.label: Temperature range
temperatureRange.description: Ambient temperature range (Celsius) at which this weather can naturally occur. Weather outside this range is not selected by the weather system.

commonalityRainfallFactor.label: Commonality rainfall factor
commonalityRainfallFactor.description: Curve scaling this weather's biome commonality by annual rainfall (mm). X = rainfall, Y = multiplier.

transitionTicksOverride.label: Transition ticks override
transitionTicksOverride.description: If set to a value other than int.MaxValue (2147483647), overrides the default transition duration when this weather starts.

minMonolithLevel.label: Min monolith level
minMonolithLevel.description: Minimum Monolith activation level required for this weather to occur (Anomaly DLC).

canOccurInAmbientHorror.label: Can occur in ambient horror
canOccurInAmbientHorror.description: If true, this weather can occur while ambient horror is active (Anomaly DLC).

letterText.label: Letter text
letterText.description: Body text of the notification letter sent when this weather starts. Used by weather workers that send a letter.

letterLabel.label: Letter label
letterLabel.description: Header label of the notification letter sent when this weather starts.

letterDef.label: Letter def
letterDef.description: LetterDef controlling the notification letter icon, sound, and urgency.

rainRate.label: Rain rate
rainRate.description: Rate at which rain particles fall during this weather. 0 means no rain.

snowRate.label: Snow rate
snowRate.description: Rate at which snow accumulates during this weather. 0 means no snowfall.

sandRate.label: Sand rate
sandRate.description: Rate at which sand particles appear during this weather (sandstorm). 0 means no sand.

windSpeedFactor.label: Wind speed factor
windSpeedFactor.description: Multiplier applied to the base wind speed while this weather is active.

windSpeedOffset.label: Wind speed offset
windSpeedOffset.description: Flat addition to wind speed while this weather is active.

moveSpeedMultiplier.label: Move speed multiplier
moveSpeedMultiplier.description: Multiplier applied to pawn movement speed while this weather is active.

accuracyMultiplier.label: Accuracy multiplier
accuracyMultiplier.description: Multiplier applied to ranged accuracy while this weather is active.

maxRangeCap.label: Max range cap
maxRangeCap.description: Maximum effective ranged attack range while this weather is active. -1 means uncapped.

perceivePriority.label: Perceive priority
perceivePriority.description: Priority used when multiple weathers are active to decide which one colonists perceive for mood thoughts.

doToxicBuildup.label: Do toxic buildup
doToxicBuildup.description: If true, pawns exposed to this weather accumulate toxic buildup over time.

weatherThought.label: Weather thought
weatherThought.description: ThoughtDef added to colonists while they are exposed to this weather.

maxGlow.label: Max glow
maxGlow.description: Maximum outdoor light glow level (0-1) while this weather is active. 1 means full daylight.

preventSkygaze.label: Prevent skygaze
preventSkygaze.description: If true, colonists will not engage in skygaze recreation while this weather is active.

preventsShuttleLaunch.label: Prevents shuttle launch
preventsShuttleLaunch.description: If true, shuttles cannot launch from the map while this weather is active.

ambientSounds.label: Ambient sounds
ambientSounds.description: SoundDefs played as ambient audio while this weather is active.

eventMakers.label: Event makers
eventMakers.description: Objects that fire WeatherEvent subclass instances at random intervals during this weather.

overlayClasses.label: Overlay classes
overlayClasses.description: C# SkyOverlay subclass names rendered on top of the map during this weather. Mods can define additional subclasses.

skyColorsNightMid.label: Sky colors night mid
skyColorsNightMid.description: Sky color set used at midnight.

skyColorsNightEdge.label: Sky colors night edge
skyColorsNightEdge.description: Sky color set used at the edge of night (just before and after midnight transitions).

skyColorsDay.label: Sky colors day
skyColorsDay.description: Sky color set used during daylight hours.

skyColorsDusk.label: Sky colors dusk
skyColorsDusk.description: Sky color set used at dusk and dawn.

workerClass.label: Worker class
workerClass.description: C# WeatherWorker subclass that implements this weather's tick-by-tick behavior.

basic-weather.label: Basic weather
basic-weather.description: A weather type with standard sky colors and a worker class.
